reviews.comment:
Hay un playero llamado Victor que es un maleducado trata mal a la gente y siendo socio del automóvil club me echo y Nome dejo estacionar el auto ahí de muy mala manera y con mi mamá que es una persona ya muy mayor

(Translated by Google)
There's a beach attendant named Victor who's rude and treats people badly. Even though I'm a member of the automobile club, he kicked me out and wouldn't let me park my car there in a very rude manner, and my mother, who is quite elderly, was with me.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NnVXLXlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
En esta YPF atienden los mejores playeros. Son re macanudos, simpáticos y atentos. Todo super limpio y en precio. Siempre voy y no la cambio por nada porque es una de las pocas YPF que no te meten NAFTA podrida

(Translated by Google)
This YPF station has the best attendants. They're really great, friendly, and attentive. Everything is super clean and reasonably priced. I always go there and wouldn't trade it for anything because it's one of the few YPF stations that doesn't sell you rotten gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5ek5UMy1BRRAB
